subject: signatory authority for net works and enrononline

emails.subject: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline
emails.subject_base: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline
emails.body: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline Tana: Does Robert Jones, HR VP, have signatory authority for Net Works and EnronOnline? Per Michelle Cash, he needs it since he signs employment contracts, ect. If he does not, we'll need to have some retroactive resolutions prepared. Please let me know. Leslie

emails.subject: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline
emails.subject_base: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline
emails.body: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline Tana: Does Robert Jones, HR VP, have signatory authority for Net Works and EnronOnline? Per Michelle Cash, he needs it since he signs employment contracts, ect. If he does not, we'll need to have some retroactive resolutions prepared. Please let me know. Leslie

emails.subject: Re: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline
emails.subject_base: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline
emails.body: Re: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline Robert Jones appears to be a VP of Enron Net Works, but not EnronOnline. By copy of this email to Deb Korkmas, I would like to confirm that the above is correct, and if it is, can we please get Robert Jones added as a VP of EnronOnline. Thanks! Leslie Hansen 11/09/2000 01:00 PM
